document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Beaver Bank, Hammonds Plains and Upper Sackville

provisions.text: C-6 ZONE REQUIREMENTS In any C-6 Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Lot Area 40,000 square feet (3716.1 m2) Minimum Frontage 200 feet (30.5 m) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 50 feet (15.2 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 25 feet (7.6 m) Maximum Lot Coverage 25 per cent Maximum Height of Main Building 35 feet (10.7 m)

content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in any C -6 (Commercial Entertainment) Zone
In any C-6 Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the

Minimum Lot Area 40,000 square feet (3716.1 m2) Minimum Frontage 200 feet (30.5 m) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 50 feet (15.2 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 25 feet (7.6 m) Maximum Lot Coverage 25 per cent Maximum Height of Main Building 35 feet (10.7 m)

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: 18.3 OTHER REQUIREMENTS: PARKING AND OUTDOOR DISPLAY
In any C-6 Zone, the following shall apply:
content_blocks.text: (a) No open storage or outdoor display shall be permitted. (b) Except where any commercial use abuts another commercial use, no parking shall be permitted within any required side or rear yard, except where a fence or other visual and physical barrier is erected in which case there will be no parking within 5 feet of the side or rear lot line. (c) The parking lot shall be demarcated and paved or otherwise maintained with a stable surface which is treated in a manner to prevent the raising of dust and loose particles.

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
